parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: 'ministral-3:8b', temperature: 0.1, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You classify user intent for a food-ordering voice assistant. Return strict JSON only: {\"intent\":string,\"requiresMcp\":boolean,\"action\":string,\"query\":string,\"ask\":string}. Use requiresMcp=true when DB/API lookup is needed (menu availability, prices, orders, customer records). If simple greeting/chitchat/clarification, requiresMcp=false.' }, { role: 'user', content: `User text: ${$json.userText}\nRecent messages: ${JSON.stringify(($json.messages || []).slice(-8))}` } ] } }}

={{ { traceId: $json.traceId, action: $json.action || 'database.question', params: { query: $json.query, userText: $json.userText, roomId: $json.roomId, deviceId: $json.deviceId }, roomId: $json.roomId, deviceId: $json.deviceId, requestedByWorkflowId: $json.requestedByWorkflowId } }}
